title: Das Haus der Lüge
writer: Fanny Carlsen, Henrik Ibsen, Lupu Pick
actors: Werner Krauss, Mary Johnson, Lucie Höflich
plot: Hjalmar Ekdal's father was rich until scandal cast the family into poverty. Now he lives in a small, shabby home with his senile father, his wife Gina and his daughter Hedvig. And a duck.
